The '''X46-7-Class Ore Carrier''' was a [[Transport/Legends|transport]] produced by [[Damorian Manufacturing Corporation/Legends|Damorian Manufacturing Corporation]]. One such ship was the ''[[Galax Titan]]''.

==Characteristics==
The X46-7 was designed to transport raw ore to refineries. Measuring 175 meters in length, it could carry up to eight passengers and 5,000 metric tons of cargo. It was manned by a crew of twenty.

==History==
It was considered outdated by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Ship-stub}}
